emails.subject: Conoco Pipe Line
emails.body: Conoco Pipe Line Credit called me and believes the following deals should be booked to Conoco Power Marketing. Can you check on them for me and let me know? I appreciate it. 507417 507430 506549 506550 506551 Gracias!!

emails.subject: Re: Conoco Pipe Line
emails.body: Re: Conoco Pipe Line I just spoke with Sean Crandall, the trader on these deals, and he said the counterparty could be either Conoco Pipeline Co. or Conoco Power Marketing. If credit has specified the latter, I'll change these deals. Just let me know. Thanks, Kate Rhonda L Denton 01/30/2001 03:34 PM
